creator: gspurki@gmail.com
text:
After upgrading to php80/php80-extensions, nextcloud was not able to load intl.so, however i could fix it by making the following four links:

ln -s /usr/local/lib/libicuio.so.72.1 /usr/local/lib/libicuio.so.71

ln -s /usr/local/lib/libicui18n.so.72.1 /usr/local/lib/libicui18n.so.71

ln -s /usr/local/lib/libicuuc.so.72.1 /usr/local/lib/libicuuc.so.71

ln -s /usr/local/lib/libicudata.so.72.1 /usr/local/lib/libicudata.so.71

That was one of the PHP errors:

PHP Warning:  PHP Startup: Unable to load dynamic library 'intl.so' (tried: /usr/local/lib/php/20200930/intl.so (Shared object "libicuio.so.71" not found, required by "intl.so"), /usr/local/lib/php/20200930/intl.so.so (Cannot open "/usr/local/lib/php/20200930/intl.so.so")) in Unknown on line 0
